description: svi2-pro render presets. params map 1:1 to validate_render_params keys (worker-consumable + UI-selectable). Omit motion_scale_schedule/motion_scale_t to keep RoPE motion scaling off (1.0).

presets.label: Natural (reference-match)
presets.description: Vanilla Wan2.2-I2V dynamics: no RoPE motion scaling, native 16fps, default shift, full 50 steps. Light AdaIN + pixel re-encode for continuation. Matches the coherent motion other Wan2.2 i2v pipelines produce. Recommended baseline.
presets.notes: blocks_to_swap=0 needs ~26 GiB VRAM (DGX/128G). For a 16GB card raise blocks_to_swap. For smoother high-fps use the natural-rife48 preset (adds frames, keeps motion speed).

presets.label: Natural + RIFE 48fps
presets.description: Same natural Wan2.2-I2V render at native 16fps, then frame-interpolated to 48fps. Adds in-between frames (no motion speed-up) for buttery playback. Uses rife-ncnn-vulkan if rife_bin is set, else falls back to ffmpeg minterpolate.
presets.notes: interpolate_method=rife needs rife_bin (path to rife-ncnn-vulkan); without it set interpolate_method=ffmpeg. Render cost identical to natural-reference; interpolation is a fast post-step.

presets.label: Forced motion 24fps (over-driven)
presets.description: Aggressive motion via per-clip RoPE ramp + lowered shift + 24fps + stronger AdaIN, fewer steps. Produces exaggerated/uncanny movement (head-whip, face-morph) and 1.5x-fast playback vs native 16fps. Kept for A/B reference; NOT the natural look.
presets.notes: motion_scale_schedule > 1.5 drives RoPE temporal stretch past training distribution -> deformation. Diagnostic only.
